symbols.name: main
symbols.short_description: Bootstraps DB init, transport startup, scheduler registration, and poller startup.

symbols.name: discord_enabled
symbols.short_description: Returns whether Discord support should be enabled from env vars.

symbols.name: start_schedulers
symbols.short_description: Creates the APScheduler instance and registers recurring summary jobs.

symbols.name: start_poller
symbols.short_description: Creates the singleton background task that runs the shared poller loop.

symbols.name: weekly_leaderboards
symbols.short_description: Posts scheduled leaderboard snapshots for all configured chats and channels.

symbols.name: weekly_champion
symbols.short_description: Posts scheduled weekly champion messages for all configured chats and channels.

symbols.name: init
symbols.short_description: Creates or migrates the SQLite schema and ensures indexes exist.

symbols.name: link_telegram_account
symbols.signature: def link_telegram_account(telegram_user_id: int, tg_username: str, lc_username: str)
symbols.short_description: Creates or repoints a Telegram link to a shared LeetCode user and initializes tracking state.

symbols.name: relink_telegram_account
symbols.signature: def relink_telegram_account(telegram_user_id: int, tg_username: str, lc_username: str)
symbols.short_description: Repairs Telegram ownership of an existing shared LeetCode user.

symbols.name: unlink_telegram_account
symbols.short_description: Removes Telegram linkage and Telegram memberships, deleting the shared user only if no links remain.

symbols.name: link_discord_account
symbols.signature: def link_discord_account(discord_user_id: str, discord_username: str, lc_username: str)
symbols.short_description: Creates or repoints a Discord link to a shared LeetCode user and initializes tracking state.

symbols.name: relink_discord_account
symbols.signature: def relink_discord_account(discord_user_id: str, discord_username: str, lc_username: str)
symbols.short_description: Repairs Discord ownership of an existing shared LeetCode user.

symbols.name: unlink_discord_account
symbols.short_description: Removes Discord linkage and Discord memberships, deleting the shared user only if no links remain.

symbols.name: set_chat
symbols.signature: def set_chat(chat_id: int, title: str, tz: str = None, post_on_solve: int = None, scoring: str = None)
symbols.short_description: Upserts a Telegram chat row and optionally updates chat settings.

symbols.name: set_discord_channel
symbols.signature: def set_discord_channel(guild_id: str, channel_id: str, post_on_solve: int = None, scoring: str = None)
symbols.short_description: Upserts a Discord channel row and optionally updates channel settings.

symbols.name: join_chat
symbols.short_description: Adds the Telegram-linked shared user to a chat leaderboard.

symbols.name: join_discord_channel
symbols.signature: def join_discord_channel(guild_id: str, channel_id: str, discord_user_id: str)
symbols.short_description: Adds the Discord-linked shared user to a channel leaderboard.

symbols.name: get_tracked_users
symbols.short_description: Returns distinct shared users that still have at least one live platform link.

symbols.name: get_or_set_last_seen
symbols.signature: def get_or_set_last_seen(lc_username: str, ts: Optional[int] = None)
symbols.short_description: Reads or updates the LeetCode polling cursor for a username.

symbols.name: insert_completion
symbols.signature: def insert_completion(user_id: int, slug: str, solved_at_utc: int) -> bool
symbols.short_description: Inserts a new active completion or re-activates a solve after the 30-day repeat threshold.

symbols.name: weekly_counts
symbols.signature: def weekly_counts(chat_id: int, start: int, end: int)
symbols.short_description: Aggregates weekly Telegram leaderboard counts by shared user and difficulty.

symbols.name: weekly_counts_discord
symbols.signature: def weekly_counts_discord(guild_id: str, channel_id: str, start: int, end: int)
symbols.short_description: Aggregates weekly Discord leaderboard counts by shared user and difficulty.

symbols.name: start_telegram
symbols.short_description: Starts the Telegram long-polling loop.

symbols.name: link
symbols.short_description: Telegram `/link` handler.

symbols.name: unlink
symbols.short_description: Telegram `/unlink` handler.

symbols.name: relink
symbols.short_description: Telegram `/relink` handler.

symbols.name: join
symbols.short_description: Telegram `/join` handler.

symbols.name: leave
symbols.short_description: Telegram `/leave` handler.

symbols.name: postflag
symbols.short_description: Telegram `/postonsolve` handler.

symbols.name: leaderboard
symbols.short_description: Telegram `/leaderboard` handler.

symbols.name: stats
symbols.short_description: Telegram `/stats` handler.

symbols.name: send_telegram_solve_announcement
symbols.signature: async def send_telegram_solve_announcement(chat_id: int, user_id: int, title: str, difficulty: str, total: int, counts: dict[str, int])
symbols.short_description: Sends a live Telegram solve announcement for a newly-counted completion.

symbols.name: post_telegram_leaderboard
symbols.signature: async def post_telegram_leaderboard(chat_id: int, scoring: str, scored, header: str)
symbols.short_description: Posts a scheduled Telegram leaderboard snapshot.

symbols.name: post_telegram_champion
symbols.short_description: Posts a scheduled Telegram champion message.

symbols.name: TeLeetDiscordClient
symbols.short_description: Discord client that owns the command tree and lifecycle hooks.

symbols.name: TeLeetDiscordClient.setup_hook
symbols.short_description: Registers and syncs Discord slash commands.

symbols.name: start_discord
symbols.short_description: Starts the Discord client if Discord support is enabled.

symbols.name: wait_for_discord_ready
symbols.short_description: Blocks shared poller startup until Discord is ready or has failed.

symbols.name: register_discord_commands
symbols.short_description: Registers all Discord slash commands.

symbols.name: send_discord_solve_announcement
symbols.signature: async def send_discord_solve_announcement(guild_id: str, channel_id: str, user_id: int, title: str, difficulty: str, total: int, counts: dict[str, int])
symbols.short_description: Sends a live Discord solve announcement for a newly-counted completion.

symbols.name: post_discord_leaderboard
symbols.signature: async def post_discord_leaderboard(guild_id: str, channel_id: str, scoring: str, scored, header: str)
symbols.short_description: Posts a scheduled Discord leaderboard snapshot.

symbols.name: post_discord_champion
symbols.signature: async def post_discord_champion(guild_id: str, channel_id: str, scored)
symbols.short_description: Posts a scheduled Discord champion message.

symbols.name: LCClient
symbols.short_description: Reusable async GraphQL client for LeetCode queries.

symbols.name: LCClient.recent_ac
symbols.signature: async def recent_ac(self, username: str, limit: int = 12) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
symbols.short_description: Fetches recent accepted submissions for a LeetCode username.

symbols.name: LCClient.problem_meta
symbols.signature: async def problem_meta(self, slug: str) -> Dict[str, str]
symbols.short_description: Fetches title and difficulty metadata for a LeetCode problem slug.

symbols.name: poll_loop
symbols.short_description: Continuously polls LeetCode, inserts new solves, and sends live announcements.

symbols.name: rank_rows
symbols.short_description: Applies weighted scoring and tie-breaks to aggregated leaderboard rows.

symbols.name: parse_weights
symbols.signature: def parse_weights(weights_str: str) -> tuple[int, int, int]
symbols.short_description: Parses a scoring string and falls back to default weights on error.

symbols.name: score_counts
symbols.signature: def score_counts(counts: dict[str, int], weights: tuple[int, int, int]) -> int
symbols.short_description: Computes a weighted total from difficulty counts and a scoring tuple.

symbols.name: week_window_cst
symbols.short_description: Computes the Monday-to-Monday leaderboard window in America/Chicago and returns UTC timestamps.
